purpose: Curated slim shortlist for octoparse-lead-generation. Use this file before widening to the full Octoparse lead-generation catalog.
selection_rules: Prefer this shortlist over the full category page.
Keep recommendations narrow and default to the primary template for each track.
Treat review templates as enrichment, not discovery.
Do not treat product or generic review templates as lead-generation defaults.
For Google Maps, default to template 1577 for discovery and 941 only when reviews are explicitly needed.

templates.name: Google Maps Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants local business leads from Google Maps
The user needs business names, phones, websites, addresses, ratings, or page URLs
The user wants a default Google Maps lead template without exploring many variants

templates.name: Google Maps Reviews Scraper
recommended_when: The user explicitly wants review text or review-based enrichment
A Google Maps place details URL is already available or can be obtained first
key_inputs: Google Maps Place Details Page URLs (up to 10,000)

templates.name: Superpages Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants US local-business leads from a directory source instead of Google Maps
The user wants a stable English directory-based local-business template

templates.name: Yellow Pages Scraper (Cloud)
recommended_when: The user wants directory-based local-business leads in an English/global workflow
The user is comfortable with company plus zip-code style inputs
key_inputs: Company;zip code (with no space between but a semicolon)

templates.name: Gelbe Seiten Details Scraper (Cloud by URLs)
recommended_when: The user needs German local-business leads from a stable directory source
The user already has listing URLs and wants detail enrichment

templates.name: Google Search Scraper
recommended_when: The user wants broad B2B company discovery from Google Search
The user needs company pages, result URLs, or search-discovered targets
The user wants the default search-based company-lead template

templates.name: Google Search Email Finder (Premium)
recommended_when: The user wants Google Search based email-focused B2B lead discovery
The user cares more about finding email-bearing pages than broad result discovery
